zh.lifeSummary: 當Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox於1296年出生在蘇格蘭培爾卡吉爾時，他的父親Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox25歲，母親Margaret Graham of Menteith17歲。他於1318年與Annabella Graham of Kincardine在英國蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1346年10月17日在英國英格蘭達勒姆內維爾也斯 克羅斯享年50歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox于1296年出生在苏格兰培爾卡吉爾时，他的父亲Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox25岁，母亲Margaret Graham of Menteith17岁。他于1318年与Annabella Graham of Kincardine在英国苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1346年10月17日在英国英格兰達勒姆內維爾也斯 克羅斯享年50岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Drummond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places, notably the barony of Drummond, which is probably identical with the parish of Drymen (Stirlingshire), named from Gaelic drumainn, a derivative of druim ‘ridge’. It has been said that the principal family of this name are descended from a Hungarian nobleman, Maurice, who accompanied Edgar Atheling and his sister Margaret to Scotland in 1068, where she married King Malcolm III. However, there is disagreement on whether or not this was the case.

English: occasionally perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Dromund (Old Norse Drómundr, apparently from a word denoting a kind of Byzantine galley prevalent till the 12th cent., from Greek dromōn ‘runner’).

variants.name: Drummonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Drummond , with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Britain this surname is found mainly in County Durham.

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox was born in 1296, in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Graham of Menteith, was 17. He married Annabella Graham of Kincardine in 1318, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 17 October 1346, in Neville's Cross, Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox est né en 1296, à Cargill, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Graham of Menteith, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Annabella Graham of Kincardine en 1318, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1346, à Neville's Cross, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox 1296 in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox 25 und seine Mutter Margaret Graham of Menteith 17. Er hat 1318 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Annabella Graham of Kincardine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1346 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Neville's Cross, Durham, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox è nato il nel 1296 nel Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Graham of Menteith, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Annabella Graham of Kincardine nel 1318, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 ottobre 1346, nel Neville's Cross, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ko.lifeSummary: Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox(이)가 1296년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 카르길에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Graham of Menteith(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1318년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 Annabella Graham of Kincardine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년 10월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 네비레'스 크로스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox nasceu em 1296, em Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Graham of Menteith, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Annabella Graham of Kincardine em 1318, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1346, em Neville's Cross, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Scotla: хилл оф фирн, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox родился в 1296 г. в местности каргилл, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Graham of Menteith, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Annabella Graham of Kincardine в 1318 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 октября 1346 г. в местности невилле'с кросс, дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox nació en 1296, en Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Graham of Menteith, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Annabella Graham of Kincardine en 1318, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1346, en Neville's Cross, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
